parameters.name: X-Gusto-API-Version
parameters.description: Determines the date-based API version associated with your API call. If none is provided, your application's [minimum API version](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/api-versioning#minimum-api-version) is used.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD) for the pay periods range. Defaults to 6 months ago.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD) for the pay periods range. Cannot be more than 3 months in the future. Defaults to today.

schema.description: Comma-separated list of payroll types to include (regular, transition). Defaults to regular only.
